name: Soba Noodle Cucumber
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the julienne cucumber with vinaigrette.
2. Place a mound of the tossed cucumber in the center of each plate.
3. Surround each mound with thin slices of Ahi tuna.
4. Drizzle vinaigrette and chili oil over the plates.
5. Garnish with Daikon sprouts.
Yield: 4 portions
